end_to_end_chain_test_live.wall_time_seconds: approximately 30s (10 RSS feed fetches over the public internet)

orchestrator_halt_on_zero_sources.test: code path verified — if raw_data.sources_succeeded == 0, halt+exit 1

orchestrator_continue_on_publisher_failu.test: code path verified — if one publisher fails, subsequent ones still run unless halt_on_publish_fail=true

config_default_falls_back_to_bundled_tem.test: if ~/.cybersec-briefing/chain_config.json doesn't exist, orchestrator uses bundled assets/templates/chain_config.json

cleanup_old_runs.test: runs older than retain_runs_days are deleted after each successful chain

env_file_loading_for_publishers.test: publishers can specify env_file in their config; orchestrator sources it before invoking the publisher
env_file_loading_for_publishers.format: KEY=value lines, # comments stripped, quotes optional

bash_wrapper_python_resolution.test: orchestrate.sh tries python3 first, falls back to python, errors clearly if neither found

cross_platform_python_orchestrator.test: orchestrate.py uses sys.executable for sub-script invocation, pathlib for paths, works on Windows / Mac / Linux

vault_member_install_time_estimate_minut: 10 (4 Skill installs + 1 config edit + 1 cron line). 25 if they choose WordPress/Notion publisher and need credential setup.
